tweets.text: This week at State, @SecPompeo traveled to Saudi Arabia, Afghanistan, UAE, India and joined President @realDonaldTrump at #G20OsakaSummit, and the United States participated in the #OASassembly. Read more: https://t.co/fXLkvEVjMb https://t.co/G0tXd8nzpG

As we wrap up #CaribbeanAmericanHeritageMonth 2019, we celebrate the United States’ historical ties and continued commitment to the Caribbean region — past, present, and future! https://t.co/Ywm4CCKjet

The U.S. is committed to supporting #Colombia’s mine action efforts. Find out how @StateDeptPM and @USEmbassyBogota are working with partners to eliminate the threat of unexploded ordnance and other explosive remnants of war in Colombia. #OASAssembly https://t.co/m7TZroMTgW
.@SecPompeo met with Japanese Foreign Minister @konotaromp to discuss the U.S.-#Japan alliance.@usembassytokyo https://t.co/5PaLJzQ8u4

.@SecPompeo met with @konotaromp to discuss the U.S.-#Japan alliance and cooperation on pressing issues, including their shared commitment to the final, fully verified denuclearization of the DPRK and to addressing common challenges in the Indo-Pacific. https://t.co/kTEX2o5VSh

This week, President @realDonaldTrump attends the #G20OsakaSummit to promote growth and prosperity; free, fair, and reciprocal trade; innovation; and transparent development finance. https://t.co/yRziM1FMjL https://t.co/I9ml94YLi9

.@StateDeptDSS is disrupting international criminal organizations and strengthening U.S. border security through its visa fraud detection and deterrence program in #Nepal. https://t.co/ym2UfEW5IC @USEmbassyNepal
Starting soon! @WHAAsstSecty Breier will deliver remarks at the @OAS_official General Assembly in Medellín, Colombia. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. #OASassembly

.@AsstSecStateAF Nagy discusses his travel to Sudan, Ethiopia, Mozambique, and South Africa, where he discussed concrete ways to strengthen cooperation between the United States and our African partners. https://t.co/gnUxDjg6Ep

.@WHAAsstSecty Breier will lead the U.S. delegation to the 49th Regular Session of the General Assembly of the @OAS_official to be held in Medellín, Colombia, June 26-28, 2019. #OASassembly https://t.co/THJefLwPrI

Special Rep. Hook: The Iranian regime, the world’s leading state sponsor of terrorism, would rather see the Palestinian people trapped in an endless cycle of poverty, because they prioritize ideology over the welfare of not only the Palestinian people, but the Iranian people. https://t.co/sLNoy7qbdn
Maritime Drug Interdiction is a key part of @StateINL's fight to keep dangerous drugs from reaching U.S. shores! Watch our partners in action this #WorldDrugDay. https://t.co/KPxVrQoaHy
On #WorldDrugDay, read how @StateINL works around the globe to strengthen law enforcement operations and stop drugs from reaching our shores. https://t.co/FuKPoMTCrr https://t.co/NsGZrveb9I
Earlier today, @SecPompeo met with #India’s Prime Minister @NarendraModi to discuss the #USIndia strategic partnership. https://t.co/FHAqAFMmVM

.@SecPompeo: Today I want you all to know how much #India means to the United States: Right now we have a perfect chance to go even further than many have dreamed. Right now we are poised to do incredible things for our people, the region, and the world. #USIndia https://t.co/iGIP3ezH51
.@SecPompeo comments on U.S.-#India economic relations. https://t.co/l3bFRSAazh

.@SecPompeo: #India is standing up more on the world stage. We welcome your assertiveness, because it’s good for the world. It’s why we have for years supported you for a permanent seat on the UNSC. We’ve seen what’s possible when we work together for the common good. #USIndia https://t.co/pP7Ja0Wqpn

.@SecPompeo: We’re blessed that the #USIndia friendship is rooted in a solid foundation. The rule of law. Respect for human dignity. The importance of civil society. These ideals allow people to flourish. The Indian people believe in them. Americans believe in them. #India https://t.co/1re4RayAsS

.@SecPompeo: I just finished a day of excellent meetings with PM @narendramodi and Minister @DrSJaishankar. We didn’t just talk about our bilateral, strategic partnership. We talked about the world and what I will call a new age of ambition for our two proud nations. #USIndia https://t.co/PUKPv0rgLr
Today, @SecPompeo will deliver remarks on #USIndia policy at 9:30 a.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.

.@SecPompeo is in India, where he will meet with Prime Minister @narendramodi and Minister of External Affairs @DrSJaishankar to advance our ambitious shared #USIndia agenda. Read more: https://t.co/mJ3X9JpBkm https://t.co/xwMqKYHK6h

Today, the U.S. signed a new conventional weapons destruction memorandum with #Ukraine. This project will advance Ukraine towards its goal of meeting international standards for physical security and stockpile management. https://t.co/PcWVeb9d0D

In Abu Dhabi, @SecPompeo met with Crown Prince @Mohamedbinzayed to discuss heightened tensions in the region and the need to support maritime security. See details of his full trip: https://t.co/Dr4qt49lwt https://t.co/vCOlUSI7VG

From July 16-18, @SecPompeo will convene the 2nd #IRFMinisterial in Washington, D.C. Advancing international #religiousfreedom for all remains one of the defining challenges of the 21st century and is a top foreign policy priority of this administration. https://t.co/l5VeI5fJVk

Special Representative for #Venezuela Elliott Abrams: We support Interim President @jguaido’s efforts; the barrier to a peaceful resolution remains Maduro’s refusal to step aside. https://t.co/yxwLJe2fDk
Today, Special Representative Elliott Abrams will address reporters on #Venezuela at 10:00 a.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.

.@SecPompeo is on travel to Saudi Arabia, the U.A.E., India, Japan, and the Republic of Korea to discuss issues of regional and mutual concern, and to deepen our partnerships to advance our shared goal of a free and open #IndoPacific region. Read more: https://t.co/GhNxNPTr4N https://t.co/Ot1WiRO6vj

Under Secretary Hale & Deputy Foreign Minister Valdivia led the 5th U.S.-#Chile High Level Dialogue, building upon @SecPompeo’s April visit. Our long-standing friendship & strategic partnership advances democracy, security & prosperity in the hemisphere. https://t.co/cLiJATtmg5 https://t.co/Cq81Hlo5HM

The United States and United Arab Emirates reaffirm ongoing commitment to further deepening ties between the two countries and the importance of the U.S.-UAE economic relationship in promoting regional prosperity and stability. https://t.co/us3kCuc7wb

Saudi Arabia, the UAE, the UK, and the U.S. express their concern over escalating tensions in the region and the dangers posed by Iranian destabilizing activity to peace and security both in Yemen and the broader region. Read the joint statement. https://t.co/VnA4M5UrRr

Today, the United States and #Canada announced financial sanctions to address the ongoing repression in #Nicaragua. We urge the Ortega regime to restore fundamental freedoms and civil rights in Nicaragua. https://t.co/v6e7WtibvM

.@IRF_Ambassador Brownback: We must move #religiousfreedom forward around the world. We look forward to working with other governments, and our partners in civil society and the religious community to do just that. https://t.co/kLnqFIxM8Y
.@SecPompeo highlights the upcoming second annual Ministerial to Advance #ReligiousFreedom that will take place at the State Department in mid-July. https://t.co/QCTgotieje

.@SecPompeo: In an effort to document the staggering scope of #religiousfreedom abuses in #Xinjiang, we’ve added a special section to this year’s China report. History will not be silent about China’s abuses – but only if voices of liberty like ours record it. https://t.co/PThMAdzN79

.@SecPompeo: The #IRFreport exposes a chilling array of abuses committed by oppressive regimes, violent extremist groups, and individual citizens. For all those that run roughshod over #ReligiousFreedom, I’ll say this: We’re watching. You will be held to account. https://t.co/zFF4P73wBB

.@SecPompeo: I’m pleased today to announce the release of the 2018 International #ReligiousFreedom Report. It’s like a report card -- it tracks countries to see how well they’ve respected this fundamental human right. https://t.co/GcWjmfwvjL

.@SecPompeo: Today, I’m pleased to announce we’re elevating the Office of International #ReligiousFreedom and the Office of the Special Envoy to Monitor and Combat Anti-Semitism at the State Department. @IRF_Ambassador @USEAntiSemitism https://t.co/sWZz3TBYLI

.@SecPompeo: The Trump Administration has promoted #religiousfreedom like never before in our foreign policy agenda.  Given our own great freedoms, it’s a distinctly American responsibility to stand up for faith in every nation’s public square. https://t.co/sgS3df21TU
Today, @SecPompeo will deliver remarks on the 2018 International #ReligiousFreedom Annual Report at 2:30 p.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/GJmZ2veYwe

Today marks the release of the 19th annual Trafficking in Persons Report. See how the State Department engages in bilateral and multilateral diplomacy, targeted foreign assistance, and public engagement to #EndTrafficking. https://t.co/r8GCYGS68C #TIPreport @JTIP_State https://t.co/VT7Sjaxo28
Ambassador John Cotton Richmond announces the release of the 2019 Trafficking in Persons Report. Download here https://t.co/ruV28FZML9 #EndTrafficking @JTIP_State https://t.co/ts1fAorNmv

Through the annual Trafficking in Persons Report, we assess what governments around the world are doing to combat this crime. The #TIPReport is an invaluable tool to arm ourselves with the latest information and guide our action at home and abroad. https://t.co/MZKlK8BMEA https://t.co/ygs6xjysla

Sister Gabriella Bottani of Italy, one of the most prominent and influential anti-trafficking advocates within the Catholic diaspora, delivers remarks on behalf of the 2019 Trafficking in Persons Report Heroes. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/qlDt1m7swH

.@SecPompeo: Our message is clear -- If you don’t stand up to trafficking, America will stand up to you. President @realDonaldTrump has proven this. And he has mobilized our federal government to make human trafficking a top human rights priority. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/cya8BKEuvY

.@SecPompeo: The focus of the 2019 TIP Report is to encourage governments to address forms of human trafficking occurring within their country’s own borders...Traffickers exploit an estimated 77 percent of victims in their home country. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/AzfiBuv8l3

.@SecPompeo: Human trafficking is a stain on humanity. We detest it because it flagrantly violates the unalienable rights that belong to all human beings. Every person, everywhere, is inherently vested with profound, inherent, and equal dignity. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/Mh5jAtNaG4

.@SecPompeo shares the story of a victim of sex trafficking from #Venezuela and highlights the grim reality that there are 25 million adults and children suffering from labor and sex trafficking all over the world—including in the U.S., and in this very city. #EndTrafficking https://t.co/sh15L61mXd

Today, @SecPompeo, joined by Advisor to the President @IvankaTrump, will unveil the 2019 Trafficking in Persons #TIPreport and honor the 2019 TIP Report Heroes, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/WWLeS35tvy

As we mark the International Day for the Elimination of Sexual Violence in Conflict, the United States remains resolute in its commitment to preventing conflict-related sexual violence and holding accountable those responsible. #EndRapeinWar https://t.co/2CczhVQjH6

.@VP Pence toured the #USNSComfort at the Port of Miami as the ship embarks on a five-month deployment to Latin America and the Caribbean to address the humanitarian crisis in #Venezuela and to strengthen partnerships in the region. https://t.co/gxHqbOBBMc #EnduringPromise

Deputy Secretary Sullivan convened Caribbean diplomats and U.S. insurance experts to discuss with our Caribbean partners options to access catastrophe insurance in support of the U.S. Caribbean Resilience Partnership. Practical steps = tangible results. https://t.co/UBFmPmepwq https://t.co/bo12p0jyVc

On June 20, @SecPompeo will unveil the 2019 Trafficking in Persons (TIP) report with Advisor @IvankaTrump and honor men and women from around the globe whose tireless efforts have made a lasting impact on the fight against modern slavery. https://t.co/o8aS3usP81 https://t.co/s1DFQnjrv7
This evening, @SecPompeo welcomed European Union High Representative @FedericaMog to the State Department. https://t.co/bnW1TKfUC8

Today, @SecPompeo met with Gen. McKenzie and his team at @CENTCOM and Gen. Clarke and his team at @USSOCOM in Tampa to ensure the State Department and @DeptofDefense are deeply coordinated across a whole broad range of issues. Read the Secretary's remarks: https://t.co/UBuXPN9RBw https://t.co/Uvom0ukaza

On June 18, @SecPompeo will visit @CENTCOM and @USSOCOM at @macdill_afb in Tampa, Florida, to meet with Gen. Kenneth McKenzie and Gen. Richard Clark to discuss regional security concerns and ongoing operations. https://t.co/a4Z7dchFEt
.@statedeptspox provides an update on U.S. foreign assistance to the Northern Triangle countries of #ElSalvador, #Guatemala, and #Honduras. https://t.co/fKh0HuOhUK
.@statedeptspox provides a readout of @USAIDMarkGreen’s travel to the #DRC, #Rwanda, and #Somalia. https://t.co/pjg7WFyKQ7
This morning, @SecPompeo welcomed #Italy’s Deputy Prime Minister @matteosalvinimi to the State Department. @ItalyMFA @AmbasciataUSA @ItalyinUS https://t.co/TQRQCFNEeC
Happy birthday, @USArmy! #ArmyBday

.@SecPompeo: The United States will defend its forces and interests, and stand with our partners and allies to safeguard global commerce and regional stability. We call upon all nations threatened by #Iran’s provocative acts to join us in that endeavor. https://t.co/snjIVxtl2t
Today, @SecPompeo will deliver remarks to the media at 2:15 p.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.

.@SecPompeo at #IndiaIdeasSummit: The @realDonaldTrump Administration has already enabled American companies to export more high-tech items to India, including cutting-edge defense platforms like armed UAVs and ballistic missile defense systems...We want to do much more. @USIBC https://t.co/RW5l844Ott

.@SecPompeo at #IndiaIdeasSummit: It’s only natural world’s most populous democracy should partner w/world’s oldest democracy to maintain shared vision for Indo-Pacific: One of econ. openness. One of liberty & sovereignty. One in which econ. growth reinforces democratic values. https://t.co/NsqzCdx8j4

.@SecPompeo at #IndiaIdeasSummit: Under President @realDonaldTrump, we’ve taken our defense cooperation to new heights, solidified our common vision for the Indo-Pacific, and taken a far tougher stand on Pakistan’s unacceptable support for terrorism. @USIBC https://t.co/mnmu5Whx4J
Today, @SecPompeo will deliver remarks at the #IndiaIdeasSummit and 44th Annual Meeting of the @USIBC at the @USChamber at 4:00 p.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.

.@UnderSecT Thompson met with Russian Deputy Foreign Minister Ryabkov in Prague today to discuss a range of U.S. national security priorities and strategic security issues on which the United States would like to engage in a more constructive dialogue with #Russia. https://t.co/458jnror1R

.@statedeptspox: Yesterday, the @WhiteHouse released the U.S. Strategy on Women, Peace, and Security, which marks a bold step in the @realDonaldTrump Administration’s commitment to promoting women’s empowerment as a cornerstone of foreign policy. https://t.co/Uu4B56IQKs

.@statedeptspox: @USTreasury’s OFAC imposed sanctions on an #Iraq-based Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps-Qods Force financial conduit, South Wealth Resources Company, which has trafficked hundreds of millions of dollars’ worth of weapons to IRGC-QF-backed Iraqi militias. https://t.co/TjrDyG1LnL

.@statedeptspox: Yesterday, @USTreasury’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) designated 16 individuals and entities associated with an international network benefiting the Assad regime...While ordinary Syrians lose everything, Assad and his friends get rich. https://t.co/op9WhSIJkL

.@statedeptspox: We at State Department are pleased to announce the Department has appointed Ambassador Donald Booth as Special Envoy for #Sudan. His announcement demonstrates U.S. has a firm commitment to the Sudanese people & efforts to advance a peaceful, political solution. https://t.co/AwnKChAqPE

Today, Under Secretary Hale welcomed Foreign Minister @YMahmoudAli and his delegation for the United States-Djibouti Binational Forum. #Djibouti is a strong partner in promoting security and prosperity in the Horn of Africa. https://t.co/5Pu8SfODzx
This morning, @SecPompeo welcomed #Canada’s Foreign Minister @cafreeland to the State Department. @CanadaFP @USEmbassyOttawa @CanEmbUSA https://t.co/PQdxaS37Yz

Today, on June 11, 2019, and in recognition of the 10th anniversary of our Charter on Strategic Partnership, the United States and #Georgia reaffirm our commitment to the U.S. – Georgia strategic partnership and the core principles of our friendship. https://t.co/UUY8tAHQMG https://t.co/WpVgOd0FlZ

.@SecPompeo on International Narcotics Control: We’ve focused much of our energy on #China, because of the increase in fentanyl, which is purchased online and delivered directly to users and dealers through the mail, and often shipped through Mexico as well. https://t.co/m83k3HxSxi
Today, @SecPompeo testifies before the Senate Caucus on International Narcotics Control at 2:30 p.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.

Under Sec. Hale & Foreign Secretary @shahidfsbd co-chaired 7th U.S.-#Bangladesh Partnership Dialogue to reaffirm commitment to enduring partnership, highlighting cooperation on security, development, humanitarian aid & disaster relief, & counterterrorism. https://t.co/ncOMakWert https://t.co/ubVKwDWjzY
Today, @SecPompeo gave remarks at the U.S.-#Georgia Strategic Partnership Commission with Georgian Prime Minister @BakhtadzeMamuka. @usingeo @georgianembassy https://t.co/THhrFBBYFc
.@StateDeptSpox: @SecPompeo will travel to India, Sri Lanka, Japan, and the Republic of Korea on June 24-30. https://t.co/RF2TpljyWS

.@StateDeptSpox: The U.S. does not recognize the legitimacy of the so called parliamentary elections in #Georgia’s South Ossetia region on June 9 and we will not acknowledge their outcome. https://t.co/H3QHPt2a7d
.@StateDeptSpox: The U.S. expresses grave concern about the Hong Kong government’s proposed amendments to its Fugitive Offenders Ordinance. https://t.co/pbQ9ViCRsG
.@StateDeptSpox: The international community must hold the Iranian regime accountable for its threats to expand its nuclear program. https://t.co/8oP2y9oVvQ
.@StateDeptSpox: The @USTreasury designated Iran’s petrochemical sector for supporting the IRGC. The maximum pressure campaign continues and will continue. https://t.co/vYWI12PGhy

.@SecPompeo: We’ve got work ahead of us to implement what we agreed to, not just in the Joint Declaration, but the approach for Central America we agreed to last December. As President @realDonaldTrump tweeted, he has full confidence #Mexico will fulfill our shared commitments. https://t.co/zOb7dxbfJN

.@SecPompeo: It took hard work to get here...I want to repeat my gratitude to #Mexico's Foreign Minister @m_ebrard and his team for their labors and the same goes for America’s hardworking State Department team. All of you made both our countries proud. https://t.co/q1dSEFQVjD

.@SecPompeo: The agreement the United States and #Mexico locked in last Friday reflects diplomacy at its finest. It shows the enduring strength of our relationship. And it is a major win for the American people. https://t.co/amJlE6aJdz
Today, @SecPompeo will deliver remarks to the media at 3:30 p.m. ET. The Department Press Briefing with @statedeptspox will immediately follow. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.

.@SecPompeo at #FoodPrize19: The solutions to quelling hunger and malnutrition are complex. But one thing they will have in common is innovation—like those devised by Dr. Borlaug and Mr. Groot. @WorldFoodPrize https://t.co/HvRdLnNchJ

.@SecPompeo on #FoodPrize19 Laureate: Mr. Simon Groot's remarkable improvements to tropical vegetable seeds helped small farmers in developing nations produce more food and earn more income, curbing hunger and stimulating economic growth at the same time. @WorldFoodPrize https://t.co/AA16ix4wzU

.@SecPompeo at #FoodPrize19: Today 820+ million people suffer from chronic hunger. There isn’t a single cause but we know the majority live in conflict zones or fragile states. The State Dept has taken on this challenge. Our diplomats work w/local govts to respond to food crises. https://t.co/EUsx2ThcTW
Today, @SecPompeo delivers remarks at the @WorldFoodPrize Laureate Announcement Ceremony at 9:30 a.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. #FoodPrize19

This week, @SecPompeo delivered remarks at #GES2019 and traveled to #Germany, #Switzerland, #Netherlands; and to the #UnitedKingdom with President @realDonaldTrump.  Read more: https://t.co/dEhwzx8GS8 https://t.co/z16B6Hg5SW

Today, the National Assembly published a decree signed by Interim President Juan Guaido on May 21, to extend the validity of Venezuelan passports. The U.S. recognizes this extension of passport validity for visa issuance and other consular purposes. https://t.co/n1akMzlun1

Today, the U.S. designated Iran’s largest petrochemical holding group, Persian Gulf Petrochemical Industries Company, for providing support to Khatam al-Anbiya Construction Headquarters, the UN-designated engineering conglomerate of the IRGC. https://t.co/YcqwBOqLmG https://t.co/p8lcjDZBeh

.@SecPompeo: Government has to stop strangling business...This formula of lower taxes and light-touch regulation works everywhere. So let’s all make entrepreneurship great again! #GES2019 https://t.co/lRXdClwpjt

.@SecPompeo: Entrepreneurs need the rule of law—a legal system that is predictable and consistent...Authoritarian states can steal ideas and prop up their own business enterprises, but they’ll never match the entrepreneurship and innovation found in free societies. #GES2019 https://t.co/55hnklhurx

.@SecPompeo: Entrepreneurs need the right to private property—both physical and intellectual. Without this right, there’s no incentive to innovate, because there’s no reward. Property rights are the bedrock of any successful economy. #GES2019 https://t.co/E7QRWyCT9K

.@SecPompeo: The United States is honored to co-host this 9th annual @theGESSummit with our Dutch friends. Our countries share an abiding belief in the power of entrepreneurship. #GES2019 https://t.co/qykRG2SyTb
Today, @SecPompeo will deliver remarks at @theGESsummit at 11:05 a.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. #GES2019 https://t.co/4vPuB6HHlb
.@SecPompeo holds a joint press availability with Swiss Foreign Minister @ignaziocassis in Bellinzona, #Switzerland, on June 2, 2019. https://t.co/pUn0wyTX6Y
.@SecPompeo is on travel to Germany, Switzerland, the Netherlands, and the United Kingdom. Read more: https://t.co/Aj6ilRbNXa https://t.co/DLiqUANQkZ
